description: Style Note No chance of making a fashion faux pas when you're carrying the wallet from Reid and Taylor clean, classic styling made of genuine, understated leather, this piece would also make a great gift. Featuring multiple card slots, this sleek wallet offers unbeatable practical style. Product Details Dark brown purse style wallet Has three card holders and one main compartment Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 10 cm x 6 cm
